title: VC proceedings before Delhi HC Chief Justice shut down after porn played on screen by a participant
description: The video conference (VC) hearing in the court of Delhi High Court Chief Justice was shut down on Wednesday after pornographic content and disturbing music were played repeatedly on the screen by one of the participants.A Division Bench of Chief Justice Devendra Kumar Upadhyaya and Justice Tejas Karia was conducting the proceedings when the incident happened for the first time at around 12:56 PM. The court staff shut down the VC proceedings immediately. Minutes later, as the VC was restored, the
